sources.title: AI in Aging and Elderly Care Market Deep Analysis Report 2026 to 2035
sources.claim: Market valued at $56.78B in 2025, projected to reach $387.52B by 2035 at 21.3% CAGR. Historical baseline: $21.8B in 2021, $38.5B in 2023 — used for 5-year growth calculation.

sources.title: AI In Elderly Care Market Size, Share & 2031 Growth Trends Report
sources.claim: Market worth $44.61B in 2026, growing at 15.16% CAGR to reach $90.35B by 2031. Key players: CarePredict, Intuition Robotics, Vayyar Imaging, Nobi, K4Connect, Sensi.AI.

sources.title: AI in Elderly Care Market Growth & Forecast 2026-2033
sources.claim: Market growing from $54.36B in 2025 to $67.56B in 2026 at 24.3% CAGR. Provides basis for 1-year growth figure of +24%.

sources.title: Sage secures $65M to scale AI monitoring platform for aging population
sources.claim: Sage raised $65M in March 2026, bringing total capital raised to $124M. Platform scales AI monitoring across nursing homes and assisted living facilities.

sources.title: Enzo Health Raises $26M to Deploy AI Across Home Health
sources.claim: Enzo Health raised $26M in May 2026 (led by N47) to expand AI platform into skilled nursing and hospice care, targeting unprecedented demand from aging Americans.

sources.title: AI-enabled senior care company CarePredict scores $29M
sources.claim: CarePredict raised $29M Series A-3 co-led by Aspire Healthtech Partners and SV Health Investors. Tempo wearable uses ML to predict ADL decline 72 hours before a clinical event.

sources.title: Navigating the future of artificial intelligence technologies for improving the care of older adults
sources.publisher: PubMed Central / Innovation in Aging (Oxford Academic)
sources.claim: Peer-reviewed analysis of AI in elder care. Documents PESTAL factors including Medicare's ~80% revenue share, HIPAA/GDPR compliance requirements, caregiver workforce shortages, and digital literacy barriers for the 75+ demographic.

sources.title: AI Companions Are Redefining Elder Care: 3 Ways They Fight Loneliness, Boost Safety And Scale Support
sources.claim: 94% of ElliQ users report feeling healthier and more connected; 95% report reduced loneliness. AI companions engage seniors an average of 60 interactions per day.

sources.title: K4Connect and Vayyar Care Partner to Bring Next-Level Radar Fall Detection Technology to Senior Living
sources.claim: Vayyar Care's contactless radar sensing technology is installed in over 12,000 rooms across senior care facilities globally. K4Connect partnership extends U.S. senior living distribution.

sources.title: 2026 Tech Trends Among 50+ Adults: From Texting to AI
sources.claim: AI usage among adults 65+ nearly doubled from 2024 to 2025, with approximately 30% now reporting interactions with AI platforms or apps. Voice health tools and health monitoring AI rank as most appealing categories.

sources.title: A New Era of Physical AI Senior & Dementia Care
sources.claim: Confirms physical AI and companion robotics entering dementia care facilities. Documents market momentum for AI in memory care settings.

sources.title: Redefining Elderly Care with Agentic AI: Challenges and Opportunities
sources.claim: Academic paper documenting agentic AI opportunities in elderly care including fall prevention, medication adherence, cognitive monitoring, and companion applications. Published July 2026.
sources.note: Preprint — not peer-reviewed. Treat as directionally accurate for applications landscape, not for market size claims.

unverified_claims.note: No publicly available quarterly growth figure found for the AI elder care market. Derived from annualized CAGR estimates (~21%); actual quarterly pace is unverified. [unverified]

unverified_claims.claim: Market share percentages for individual companies
unverified_claims.note: No public third-party market share breakdown by company found. Percentages in market[] section are estimates derived from reported deployment scale and funding relative to total market. [unverified]

unverified_claims.claim: U.S. will reach 1:11 caregiver-to-senior ratio by 2030
unverified_claims.note: Widely cited in industry reports but primary government or academic source not confirmed. Directionally consistent with AHRQ and BLS workforce projections. [partially verified]

unverified_claims.claim: Adults 65+ will outnumber children in U.S. by 2034
unverified_claims.note: Sourced from U.S. Census Bureau projections widely reported in 2023–2024 but exact URL not retrieved in this research session. [partially verified]
